title: gdm bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[1:47.0-11]
- Quit plymouth when no local display is available

[1:47.0-10]
- Fix launching headless service on boot

[1:47.0-9]
- Fix leak on new connections

[1:47.0-8]
- meson: Define missing HAVE_LIBAUDIT
full_text:
[1:47.0-11]
- Quit plymouth when no local display is available

[1:47.0-10]
- Fix launching headless service on boot

[1:47.0-9]
- Fix leak on new connections

[1:47.0-8]
- meson: Define missing HAVE_LIBAUDIT

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-20372-0.html
